revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十一]][[zh:六月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十一]][[zh:六月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十一]][[zh:六月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十一]][[zh:六月十一]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 11|qq=June 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|qid=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}} , {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Iruka|en|Soga no Iruka|qid=Q736621|lt=Soga no Iruka|1=Soga no Iruka}} was assassinated, marking the beginning of the {{ill|Taika Reform|en|Taika Reform|qid=Q570140|lt=Taika Reform|1=Taika Reform}} . * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}} , {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} ) – {{ill|Matthew C. Perry|en|Matthew C. Perry|qid=Q61855|lt=Matthew Perry|1=Matthew C. Perry}} agreed to delay the response to the U.S. letter until the following year and withdrew from Uraga Bay, heading toward the {{ill|Ryukyu Islands|ja|琉球諸島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryukyu Islands|1=Ryukyu Islands|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10905515}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 13|en|July 13|qid=Q2687|lt=July 13|1=July 13}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) – {{ill|Sakamoto Ryōma|ja|Sakamoto Ryōma|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakamoto Ryōma|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} wrote the {{ill|Senchū Hassaku|ja|船中八策|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senchū Hassaku|1=Senchū hassaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8191633}} aboard a domain vessel traveling from Nagasaki to Hyōgo.
== Births == * Year 2 of {{ill|Manji (era)|en|Manji (era)|qid=Q1145295|lt=Manji|1=Manji (era)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 30|en|July 30|qid=Q2716|lt=July 30|1=July 30}} , {{ill|1659|en|1659|qid=Q6995|lt=1659|1=1659}} ) – {{ill|Yamamoto Tsunetomo|en|Yamamoto Tsunetomo|qid=Q548162|lt=Yamamoto Tsunetomo|1=Yamamoto Tsunetomo}} , oral narrator of {{ill|Hagakure|en|Hagakure|qid=Q387227|lt=Hagakure|1=Hagakure}} (d. {{ill|1719|en|1719|qid=Q6902|lt=1719|1=1719}} ) * Year 7 of {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} , {{ill|1787|en|1787|qid=Q7763|lt=1787|1=1787}} ) – {{ill|Kozeki San'ei|ja|小関三英|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozeki San'ei|1=Koseki San'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6531318}} , physician and {{ill|Rangaku|ja|Rangaku Scholar|1=Rangaku scholar|2=ja|3=蘭学者|qid=Q11625245|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11625245}} (d. {{ill|1839|en|1839|qid=Q7616|lt=1839|1=1839}} ) * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|qid=Q2698|lt=July 4|1=July 4}} , {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}} ) – {{ill|Kawakami Tōgai|en|Kawakami Tōgai|qid=Q11477503|lt=Kawakami Tōgai|1=Kawakami Tōgai}} , {{ill|Yōga|ja|洋Painter|1=Yōga painter|2=ja|3=洋画家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q67200599}} (Western-style painter) (d. {{ill|1881|en|1881|qid=Q7808|lt=1881|1=1881}} )
== Deaths == * Year 60 of {{ill|Emperor Seimu|en|Emperor Seimu|qid=Q316672|lt=Emperor Seimu|1=Emperor Seimu}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 30|en|July 30|qid=Q2716|lt=July 30|1=July 30}} , {{ill|190|en|190|qid=Q30437|lt=190|1=190}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Seimu|en|Emperor Seimu|qid=Q316672|lt=Emperor Seimu|1=Emperor Seimu}} , 13th emperor of Japan (b. {{ill|84|en|84|qid=Q4644769|lt=84|1=84}} ) * Year 1 of {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|qid=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}} , {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Iruka|en|Soga no Iruka|qid=Q736621|lt=Soga no Iruka|1=Soga no Iruka}} , son of {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=蘇我蝦夷|qid=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Emishi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1292368}} * Year 1 of {{ill|Shōwa (1312–1317)|en|Shōwa (1312–1317)|qid=Q1324807|lt=Shōwa (Kamakura period)|1=Shōwa (1312–1317)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 16|en|July 16|qid=Q2731|lt=July 16|1=July 16}} , {{ill|1312|en|1312|qid=Q5734|lt=1312|1=1312}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Munenobu|en|Hōjō Munenobu|qid=Q2037124|lt=Hōjō Munenari|1=Hōjō Munenobu}} , 11th {{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|qid=Q1045904|lt=Shikken|1=Shikken}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (b. {{ill|1259|en|1259|qid=Q5507|lt=1259|1=1259}} ) * Year 1 of {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|qid=Q2695|lt=July 6|1=July 6}} , {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} ) – {{ill|Furuta Oribe|en|Furuta Oribe|qid=Q1058793|lt=Furuta Oribe|1=Furuta Oribe}} (Furuta Oribe), daimyo and {{ill|Chajin|ja|茶人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chajin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 茶人人物一覧|1=list of Tea masters|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11617948}} (tea master) (b. {{ill|1544|en|1544|qid=Q6525|lt=1544|1=1544}} ) * Year 2 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 26|en|July 26|qid=Q2723|lt=July 26|1=July 26}} , {{ill|1597|en|1597|qid=Q6790|lt=1597|1=1597}} ) – {{ill|Kobayakawa Takakage|en|Kobayakawa Takakage|qid=Q1143508|lt=Kobayakawa Takakage|1=Kobayakawa Takakage}} , warlord and third son of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1156545}} (b. {{ill|1533|en|1533|qid=Q6443|lt=1533|1=1533}} ) * Year 11 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 13|en|July 13|qid=Q2687|lt=July 13|1=July 13}} , {{ill|1761|en|1761|qid=Q7649|lt=1761|1=1761}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieshige|en|Tokugawa Ieshige|qid=Q323443|lt=Tokugawa Ieshige|1=Tokugawa Ieshige}} , 9th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1711|en|1711|qid=Q6866|lt=1711|1=1711}} )
== See Also ==
